title: Server Hall Cooling: Thermal-Aware Job Placement
strategies: row-major overlap-blind: place job j at slot (j//N, j%N) (reproduces the evaluator's weak baseline; jobs pack into a corner, footprints stack, strong-vent slots go unused)

hottest-first greedy: sort jobs by descending load and drop each onto the free slot that adds the least squared over-temperature given deposits so far (overlap- and cooling-aware, but myopic and never revisits early placements)
greedy + local search: greedy build, then relocate single jobs to free slots and swap slots of unequal-load job pairs whenever total penalty drops (undoes the greedy's myopia within the op budget)
spread-then-anneal: seed a dispersed layout, then simulated-annealing / restart over the same squared-overheat objective to escape the local minima that pure descent gets stuck in
